_doc: Controlled vocabularies for project spec fields. Used for schema validation, tag suggestion, and UI normalization.

project_type.RoR: Run-of-river — no storage, power follows flow
project_type.PROR: Peaking run-of-river — limited pondage for daily peaking
project_type.Storage: Reservoir storage — seasonal or multi-seasonal regulation
project_type.Storage / Multipurpose: Storage for hydropower, irrigation, and flood control

status.pre-construction: Licensed, pre-construction activities (access roads, camps, detailed design)
status.survey: Survey licence — feasibility studies only, no construction licence yet
status.stalled: Licensed but stalled (financial, legal, or political barriers)
status.conceptual: Identified as a potential site; no licence or formal development

dam_type.Composite: Combination of two or more dam types

turbine_type.Francis: Francis turbine — medium to high head
turbine_type.Kaplan: Kaplan turbine — low head, high flow
turbine_type.Crossflow: Crossflow turbine — small hydro, low head

q_design.Q40: 40% exceedance flow — design for wetter conditions
q_design.Q65+: Higher than Q65 — unusually conservative design
